problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
mechanism: Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix
hypothesis: Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix may resolve What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
